title: Grammitis tatei
taxonomy: Grammitis tatei is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammitis, which is a group of small, terrestrial ferns. The family Polypodiaceae is a large and diverse group of ferns, commonly known as the polypody ferns or holly ferns. Grammitis tatei is native to the tropical regions of the world and is often found growing in shaded areas. The classification of Grammitis tatei is further defined by its scientific name, which is a binomial nomenclature consisting of the genus name Grammitis and the species name tatei.
